response:
## Perspective Audit Summary **Component/artifact reviewed:** Product Carousel With Autoplay Animation **Perspectives escalated for deep review:** Vestibular Motion, Cognitive Neurodivergent **Perspectives at LOW (not reviewed):** Magnification, Contrast, Auditory, Keyboard, Screen Reader, Semantic --- ### Findings by Severity | Severity | Count | |---|---| | CRITICAL | 1 | | MAJOR | 3 | | MINOR | 0 | | ENHANCEMENT | 0 | --- ### Perspectives That Passed None (both escalated perspectives have findings) --- ### Perspectives With Findings — Grouped by ARRM Role **Front-End Dev** - [Auto-play carousel lacks visible pause control] — Vestibular Motion — CRITICAL — 2.2.2 - [Badge animation not suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion] — Vestibular Motion — MAJOR — 2.3.1 - [No mechanism to disable parallax scrolling] — Vestibular Motion — MAJOR — 2.5.4 **UX Design** - [Auto-advance disrupts user control without warning] — Cognitive Neurodivergent — MAJOR — 3.2.2 --- ### Open Questions Requiring Human Verification None (all findings are code-level) --- ### Recommended Next Step **REVISE** (MAJOR findings present — address before shipping) --- ## Detailed Findings ``` **Finding:** Auto-play carousel lacks visible pause control **WCAG:** 2.2.2 Pause, Stop, Hide **Perspective:** Vestibular Motion **Severity:** CRITICAL **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** Carousel auto-advances every 3 seconds with no visible pause button in first focus order position **Fix:** Add visible pause button in top-left corner with keyboard focus priority, implement `clearInterval` on click ``` ``` **Finding:** Badge animation not suppressed under prefers-reduced-motion **WCAG:** 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold **Perspective:** Vestibular Motion **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** Visual Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `.product-badge` uses infinite `@keyframes` animation without `prefers-reduced-motion` media query **Fix:** Add CSS media query to disable animation when `prefers-reduced-motion: reduce` is active ``` ``` **Finding:** No mechanism to disable parallax scrolling **WCAG:** 2.5.4 Motion Actuation **Perspective:** Vestibular Motion **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `data-parallax="true"` attribute on carousel wrapper with no option to disable **Fix:** Add "disable motion" toggle in settings panel with localStorage persistence ``` ``` **Finding:** Auto-advance disrupts user control without warning **WCAG:** 3.2.2 On Input **Perspective:** Cognitive Neurodivergent **Severity:** MAJOR **Route to:** UX Design (secondary: Front-End Dev) **Evidence:** `setInterval` triggers slide change without user confirmation or warning **Fix:** Add "disable auto-advance" checkbox with localStorage persistence, default disabled ``` --- ## A11y Evidence Finding Blocks ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: carousel-auto-play-no-pause fingerprint: 3a7d4e1f8c9b2d6a source: perspective-audit Vestibular Motion checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.2.2 Pause, Stop, Hide section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(d) severity: CRITICAL perspective_alarms: vestibular_motion=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM evidence: Carousel auto-advances every 3 seconds with no visible pause button in first focus order position reproduction_steps: Open carousel in browser, observe automatic slide changes expected_behavior: Auto-playing content must have visible pause control in first focus order position actual_behavior: No pause control available until user reaches end of carousel trend: new ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: badge-animation-no-reduced-motion fingerprint: 5b8e2f3c7d9a1e6b source: perspective-audit Vestibular Motion checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.3.1 Three Flashes or Below Threshold section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: vestibular_motion=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM evidence: .product-badge uses infinite @keyframes animation without prefers-reduced-motion media query reproduction_steps: Enable reduced motion in OS settings, refresh page expected_behavior: Animation should be suppressed when prefers-reduced-motion is active actual_behavior: Badge continues pulsing animation trend: new ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: parallax-no-disable-option fingerprint: 7c9d3e8f2a1b6c4d source: perspective-audit Vestibular Motion checklist wcag_or_apg: 2.5.4 Motion Actuation section_508_fpc_context: 1194.22(j) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: vestibular_motion=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM evidence: data-parallax="true" attribute on carousel wrapper with no option to disable reproduction_steps: Use device motion sensors to trigger parallax expected_behavior: Must provide UI to disable motion-triggered effects actual_behavior: No option to disable parallax trend: new ``` ### A11y Evidence Finding finding_id: auto-advance-no-warning fingerprint: 9e1f4d8c3b7a2e6d source: perspective-audit Cognitive Neurodivergent checklist wcag_or_apg: 3.2.2 On Input section_508_fpc_context: 1194.31(c) severity: MAJOR perspective_alarms: vestibular_motion=HIGH, cognitive_neurodivergent=MEDIUM evidence: setInterval triggers slide change without user confirmation or warning reproduction_steps: Begin interacting with carousel while auto-advance is active expected_behavior: Content changes should not occur without user confirmation actual_behavior: Slide changes happen automatically every 3 seconds trend: new ``` --- ## Technical Recommendations 1. **Add Pause Control for Auto-Play** ```jsx // Add state and control button const [autoPlay, setAutoPlay] = useState(true); // Modify useEffect useEffect(() => { if (!autoPlay) return; const timer = setInterval(() => { setCurrentIndex((prev) => (prev + 1) % products.length); }, 3000); return () => clearInterval(timer); }, [autoPlay]); ``` 2. **Suppress Animation Under Reduced Motion** ```css @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .product-badge { animation: none; } } ``` 3. **Add Motion Disable Toggle** ```jsx const [disableMotion, setDisableMotion] = useState(false);
// In CSS .carousel-wrapper[data-parallax="true"] { transition: none; animation: none; } ``` 4. **Add Auto-Advance Warning** ```jsx useEffect(() => { if (autoPlay) { const warning = confirm("This carousel auto-advances every 3 seconds. Would you like to disable this feature?"); if (warning) setAutoPlay(false); } }, []); ```
